task_completion.description: Bookmarks are organized into the specified trade compliance folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Bookmark Manager (chrome://bookmarks) or the Bookmarks Bar displays the specific folders: 'Government Portals', 'Carriers & Logistics', 'Trade Databases', 'Industry Resources', and 'Non-Work'.

task_completion.description: Custom search engine shortcuts are configured for trade tools.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Search engines > Manage search engines and site search shows custom entries added with the specific shortcuts 'hts', 'ruling', and 'vessel'.

task_completion.description: Default font size is adjusted to 18.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Appearance > Customize fonts shows the 'Font size' slider or input box explicitly set to 18.

task_completion.description: Homepage and startup pages are configured to customs portals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > On startup shows 'Open a specific page or set of pages' selected with portal URLs added, and Appearance > Show home button is enabled with a custom web address entered.

task_completion.description: Privacy and credential settings are adjusted for handling sensitive data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Autofill and passwords shows 'Offer to save passwords' toggled off, or Privacy and security shows enhanced privacy settings (e.g., blocking third-party cookies, clearing data on exit).

task_completion.description: Download directory is set to Customs_Filings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Downloads shows the 'Location' path ending in 'Customs_Filings' (specifically /home/ga/Documents/Customs_Filings).

integrity.description: The agent used the Chrome browser GUI to make configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Chrome settings pages (chrome://settings/) and bookmark manager being actively navigated and modified, rather than terminal commands editing Chrome preference files directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the browser settings rather than just opening the text guide.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of Chrome settings menus, toggles being clicked, or text being entered into Chrome input fields, not just a text editor showing the guide.

integrity.description: The agent did not run scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show python, bash scripts, or sqlite3 commands being executed to modify ~/.config/google-chrome/Default/Preferences or Bookmarks files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: Expected bookmark folders are 'Government Portals', 'Carriers & Logistics', 'Trade Databases', 'Industry Resources', and 'Non-Work'. Custom search engine shortcuts must include 'hts', 'ruling', and 'vessel'. The download directory must be set to 'Customs_Filings' (/home/ga/Documents/Customs_Filings). The default font size must be exactly 18.
